testcase.name: emptyCurrentSchemaWhenNoExistingMigrations
testcase.system-err: May 02, 2026 5:16:52 PM org.flywaydb.core.FlywayExecutor execute INFO: Database: jdbc:h2:mem:shadow_new_empty_1777756610198 (H2 2.2) May 02, 2026 5:16:52 PM org.flywaydb.core.internal.schemahistory.JdbcTableSchemaHistory allAppliedMigrations INFO: Schema history table "public"."flyway_schema_history" does not exist yet May 02, 2026 5:16:52 PM org.flywaydb.core.internal.command.DbValidate validate INFO: Successfully validated 2 migrations (execution time 00:00.048s) May 02, 2026 5:16:52 PM org.flywaydb.core.internal.schemahistory.JdbcTableSchemaHistory create INFO: Creating Schema History table "public"."flyway_schema_history" ... May 02, 2026 5:16:52 PM org.flywaydb.core.internal.command.DbMigrate migrateGroup INFO: Current version of schema "public": << Empty Schema >> May 02, 2026 5:16:52 PM org.flywaydb.core.internal.command.DbMigrate doMigrateGroup INFO: Migrating schema "public" to version "1 - create products" May 02, 2026 5:16:52 PM org.flywaydb.core.internal.command.DbMigrate logSummary INFO: Successfully applied 1 migration to schema "public", now at version v1 (execution time 00:00.015s)

testcase.name: detectsNewTableAddedByLatestMigration
